content_body:
The Vine is a Wine Bar and bistro showcasing Georgia Wines from exceptional wineries and vineyards such as Wolf Mountain, Montaluce, Habersham, and The Cottage. Local wine tastings are offered daily. We feature several wine varieties from West Coast and International vineyards as well. Each Friday and Saturday night, enjoy our Wine and Chocolate Pairing by reservation only. 

If wine isn't your forte, have no fear! We have a number of beers from domestic to import and many craft-style brews. Our food is simple, delicious, and fresh. We also carry Fine Hand Rolled Cigars.
title: The Vine Bar & Bistro
